revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text: {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{External links}} begin-->{{Ambox | name = External links | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | type = style | class = ambox-external_links | issue = This {{{1|article}}}'s '''use of [[Wikipedia:External links|external links]] may not follow Wikipedia's policies or guidelines'''. | fix = Please [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=edit}} improve this article] by removing [[Wikipedia:What Wikipedia is not#Wikipedia is not a mirror or a repository of links, images, or media files|excessive]] or [[Wikipedia:External links|inappropriate]] external links, and converting useful links where appropriate into [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|footnote references]]. | removalnotice = yes | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Wikipedia external links cleanup }}<!--{{External links}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{External links}} begin-->{{Ambox | name = External links | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | type = style | class = ambox-external_links | issue = This {{{1|article}}}'s '''use of [[Wikipedia:External links|external links]] may not follow Wikipedia's policies or guidelines'''. | fix = Please [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=edit}} improve this article] by removing [[Wikipedia:What Wikipedia is not#Wikipedia is not a mirror or a repository of links, images, or media files|excessive]] or [[Wikipedia:External links|inappropriate]] external links, and converting useful links where appropriate into [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|footnote references]]. | removalnotice = yes | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Wikipedia external links cleanup }}<!--{{External links}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=External_links here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=External_links for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{External links}} begin-->{{Ambox | name = External links | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | type = style | class = ambox-external_links | issue = This {{{1|article}}}'s '''use of [[Wikipedia:External links|external links]] may not follow Wikipedia's policies or guidelines'''. | fix = Please [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=edit}} improve this article] by removing [[Wikipedia:What Wikipedia is not#Wikipedia is not a mirror or a repository of links, images, or media files|excessive]] or [[Wikipedia:External links|inappropriate]] external links, and converting useful links where appropriate into [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|footnote references]]. | removalnotice = yes | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Wikipedia external links cleanup }}<!--{{External links}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
